channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 vorssaint/vorssaint-utils (2625 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: vorssaint

📝 Repository: vorssaint/vorssaint-utils

📄 Descrizione: Free open-source macOS menu bar toolkit. Per-app volume mixer, system monitor, dock-preview, keep awake, window switcher (Alt Tab), shelf, app uninstaller, and much more.

⭐ Stelle: 2625

🍴 Forks: 97

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: alt-tab app-uninstaller appkit finder free keep-awake mac-os menu-bar menubar open-source swift swift-ui system-monitor uninstaller volume-mixer window-switcher

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-12T15:25:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-11T04:21:06Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 NoopApp/noop (2207 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NoopApp

📝 Repository: NoopApp/noop

📄 Descrizione: Offline WHOOP companion — pair your strap over Bluetooth, keep all data on your own device. No cloud, no account, no subscription.

⭐ Stelle: 2207

🍴 Forks: 828

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-07T17:03:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-06T05:05:44Z

]]>

item.title: 📝 EEliberto/IPA-Download (1508 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: EEliberto

📝 Repository: EEliberto/IPA-Download

📄 Descrizione: 一款用于安装 IPA 历史版本的工具，适用于获取旧版应用并自动捕获数据包。下载后，可直接通过 AirDrop 传输至 iPhone、iPad 上并安装并使用。

⭐ Stelle: 1508

🍴 Forks: 93

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-13T08:32:39Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-12T05:21:22Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 peetzweg/opendisplay (856 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: peetzweg

📝 Repository: peetzweg/opendisplay

📄 Descrizione: Free, open-source Sidecar/Duet alternative — use your iPhone or iPad as a true second monitor for your Mac over USB or WiFi. Low latency H.264, Retina HiDPI, touch input.

⭐ Stelle: 856

🍴 Forks: 69

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: duet-display external-display ipad iphone macos screen-extension screencapturekit second-monitor sidecar swift videotoolbox virtual-display

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-09T05:56:03Z

item.title: 📝 PhraseHQ/SwaTex (77 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: PhraseHQ

📝 Repository: PhraseHQ/SwaTex

📄 Descrizione: 99.9% KaTeX syntax coverage. LaTeX math renderer in pure Swift. No JavaScript, no WebView, no DOM. One Swift core → iOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, visionOS. SwiftUI · UIKit/AppKit · SVG · PNG. 2.4× the Rust reference engine. Zero re-rasterization scrolling for block editors. By Phrase (phrase.so).

⭐ Stelle: 77

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: ios iosmath katex latex math-rendering swift swiftmath

📜 Licenza: MIT License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-16T04:17:09Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub
